metadata.description: Supercharge Claude Code with 118 specialized components — from deep reasoning and autonomous dev loops to DDD architecture, design system enforcement, and git workflow automation. 29 agents, 33 commands, 56 skills across 14 modular plugins.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Quality control and workflow orchestration utilities

plugins.name: ai
plugins.description: AI engineering toolkit for production-ready LLM applications

plugins.name: doc
plugins.description: Multi-purpose documentation toolkit (generation, explanation, diagrams, health)

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Code quality review tools for development teams

plugins.name: google-stitch
plugins.description: Claude + Google Stitch workflow toolkit with MCP integration (prompt authoring, screen generation, design extraction)

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Git workflow automation (commit, PR, branching, changelog)

plugins.name: design-intent
plugins.description: UI/UX Design Plugin - Visual fidelity from Figma/mockups, design system enforcement, React UI prototyping with live browser gallery, and pattern memory. Focused exclusively on frontend visual implementation.

plugins.name: lang
plugins.description: Language-specific programming skills for production-grade code (Bash)

plugins.name: spring-boot
plugins.description: Domain-Driven Design with Spring Boot 4 (DDD patterns, Spring Data, REST APIs, Spring Modulith)

plugins.name: playwright
plugins.description: Browser automation via Playwright CLI for testing, screenshots, and interaction workflows

plugins.name: ralph
plugins.description: Autonomous development loop with fresh context per iteration, Hat-lite builder/verifier system, task sets, and persistent memories

plugins.name: roadmap
plugins.description: Product management, roadmap analysis, and solution architecture with multi-agent orchestration

plugins.name: devtools
plugins.description: Developer tooling setup and management (SOPS secrets encryption, Claude Code environment setup, multi-ecosystem quality stack for JVM/Node.js/Python, Taskfile task runner setup and audit, Tilt local Kubernetes development setup and audit, browser-companion live-preview server with cross-plugin arkhe-preview CLI)

plugins.name: startup
plugins.description: Startup idea validation pipeline with 6-stage analysis, decision gates, and domain presets
